TextScript: Agent: Good morning, thank you for calling Yellow Credit Card Services. My name is Nina. May I have your name please? Customer: Hello, my name is Somchai Prasert. Agent: Thank you, Mr. Somchai. How may I help you today? Customer: I noticed a foreign transaction on my credit card last night, but I did not make that purchase. I want to check whether it is fraud. Agent: I understand your concern. Let me review the transaction. Customer: Okay. Agent: Thank you for waiting. I can see an online purchase from overseas. I can block your current card, open a fraud investigation, and offer an emergency replacement card. Customer: Please do that. Agent: Done. Your card has been blocked, the dispute is submitted, and your replacement card will arrive within five business days. Customer: Thank you.

Agent: Hello, thank you for calling Yellow Credit Card Support. This is David speaking. May I know your name? Customer: Hi, I am Suda Chaiyasit. Agent: Thank you, Ms. Suda. What can I do for you today? Customer: I saw that my annual fee was charged this month. I have used this card for many years, so I want to ask whether the fee can be waived. Agent: Certainly, let me check your account history. Customer: Sure. Agent: Thank you for waiting. I can see that you have a strong payment record and good spending volume. I can offer a full annual fee waiver and also enroll your card in our dining cashback campaign. Customer: That sounds good. Agent: I have processed the waiver and activated the promotion. Customer: Great, thank you very much.

Agent: Welcome to Yellow Credit Card Center. My name is Amy. May I have your name please? Customer: Yes, this is Niran Kittipong. Agent: Thank you, Mr. Niran. How may I assist you today? Customer: My credit card payment due date is tomorrow, but I cannot pay the full amount this month. I want to know whether there is any installment or payment assistance program. Agent: I understand. Let me review your account options. Customer: Okay. Agent: Thank you for holding. I can offer a 6-month installment plan for your current balance with a reduced interest rate. Customer: That would help a lot. Agent: I have converted the eligible balance into the installment plan, and your new minimum payment will be updated on the app by tonight. Customer: Thank you for your help.

Agent: Thank you for calling Yellow Credit Card customer care. My name is Sophia. May I know your full name? Customer: Hi, I am Kanya Rattanakul. Agent: Thank you, Ms. Kanya. How can I assist you today? Customer: My credit card was declined at a department store this afternoon, even though I believe I still have available limit. I want to know why. Agent: I am sorry about the inconvenience. Let me check your card status. Customer: Please do. Agent: Thank you for waiting. I found that your card was temporarily locked because of an unusual high-value transaction attempt. I can verify the recent activity, unlock the card, and offer SMS alerts for extra security. Customer: Yes, please unlock it. Agent: Done. Your card is active again, and SMS alerts have been enabled. Customer: Thank you very much.

Agent: Good afternoon, you have reached Yellow Credit Card Services. My name is James. May I have your name please? Customer: Hello, I am Pimchanok Leelawat. Agent: Thank you, Ms. Pimchanok. How may I help you today? Customer: I am planning to travel to Japan next week, and I want to ask whether I need to notify the bank before using my credit card overseas. Agent: That is a good question. Let me check your card settings. Customer: Okay. Agent: Thank you for waiting. I can place a travel notice on your account, explain the foreign currency fee, and offer our travel benefits package, including airport lounge access and travel insurance details. Customer: Please add the travel notice. Agent: Certainly. The travel notice has been added, and I have sent the travel benefits summary to your email. Customer: Perfect, thank you.
